report_name: Manufacturing Remains Ransomware's Top Target as Qilin Group Continues Year-Long Dominance

threat_actors.name: Qilin
threat_actors.description: A Russian-language ransomware-as-a-service (RaaS) collective identified as the most prolific R&DE group for the fourth consecutive quarter, responsible for 295 incidents in Q2 2026. Specializes in double-extortion attacks against high-value organizations in critical infrastructure sectors.
threat_actors.goals: Financial extortion through ransomware and data exfiltration.

threat_actors.name: The Gentlemen
threat_actors.description: Identified as one of the top five most active ransomware and digital extortion (R&DE) groups in Q2 2026.

threat_actors.name: DragonForce
threat_actors.description: Identified as one of the top five most active ransomware and digital extortion (R&DE) groups in Q2 2026.

threat_actors.name: Akira
threat_actors.description: Identified as one of the top five most active ransomware and digital extortion (R&DE) groups in Q2 2026.

threat_actors.name: LockBit
threat_actors.description: Identified as one of the top five most active ransomware and digital extortion (R&DE) groups in Q2 2026.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: Qilin ransomware group encrypts victim data as part of its double-extortion strategy.

attack_patterns.name: Phishing
attack_patterns.description: Used as a typical initial access vector by ransomware groups like Qilin.

attack_patterns.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
attack_patterns.description: Used as a typical initial access vector by ransomware groups like Qilin.

attack_patterns.name: Account Discovery
attack_patterns.description: Ransomware groups like Qilin perform reconnaissance, including account discovery, after gaining initial access.

attack_patterns.name: System Information Discovery
attack_patterns.description: Ransomware groups like Qilin perform reconnaissance, including system information discovery, after gaining initial access.

attack_patterns.name: Exploitation for Privilege Escalation
attack_patterns.description: Ransomware groups like Qilin escalate privileges after gaining initial access.

attack_patterns.name: Remote Services
attack_patterns.description: Ransomware groups like Qilin move laterally across the network using remote services.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over Web Service
attack_patterns.description: Ransomware groups like Qilin exfiltrate sensitive data to their own servers before deploying the ransomware payload, as part of double-extortion tactics.

attack_patterns.name: Inhibit System Recovery
attack_patterns.description: Ransomware groups like Qilin inhibit system recovery by deleting backups or volume shadow copies, for example by using the command `vssadmin.exe delete shadows /all /quiet`.

malware.name: Qilin Ransomware
malware.description: A ransomware-as-a-service (RaaS) payload used by the Qilin group in double-extortion attacks, primarily targeting critical infrastructure sectors like manufacturing.

malware.name: Akira Ransomware
malware.description: Ransomware used by the Akira group, one of the top five most active R&DE groups in Q2 2026.

malware.name: LockBit Ransomware
malware.description: Ransomware used by the LockBit group, one of the top five most active R&DE groups in Q2 2026.

tools.name: wmic
tools.description: Mentioned as a frequent tool used for lateral movement and remote execution by ransomware operators.

tools.name: PsExec
tools.description: Mentioned as a frequent tool used for lateral movement and remote execution by ransomware operators.

identities.name: Manufacturing Sector
identities.description: Identified as the primary target for ransomware attacks in Q2 2026 due to the high cost of operational downtime.

infrastructure.name: Exfiltration Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Servers used by ransomware groups like Qilin to store exfiltrated victim data for double-extortion purposes. The article mentions large outbound transfers to unknown cloud storage.

indicators.name: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
indicators.pattern:
title: VSSAdmin Delete Shadow Copies
id: 2b8bde33-5119-457c-95e2-3493e181445a
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a common technique used by ransomware to inhibit system recovery.
references:
  - https://industrialcyber.co/threats-attacks/zerofox-warns-manufacturing-remains-ransomwares-biggest-target-amid-growing-threats-to-critical-infrastructure/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-09
tags:
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.impact
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the command used to delete Volume Shadow Copies to prevent system restore, a common ransomware precursor activity.

indicators.name: WMIC Process Execution for Lateral Movement
indicators.pattern:
title: WMIC Used for Remote Process Execution
id: 9c1a0f8d-7b3e-4d6f-8a1b-9c8d7e6f5a4b
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of wmic.exe for remote process creation, a technique often used by ransomware operators for lateral movement.
references:
  - https://industrialcyber.co/threats-attacks/zerofox-warns-manufacturing-remains-ransomwares-biggest-target-amid-growing-threats-to-critical-infrastructure/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-09
tags:
  - attack.t1021
  - attack.lateral_movement
level: medium
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\wmic.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'process call create'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the use of wmic.exe, a tool frequently used by ransomware operators for lateral movement and remote execution.

relationships.source_name: WMIC Process Execution for Lateral Movement
